title: EB and CC have update - Earbuds can be updated and popup for Charge Chase will be displayed
scenario: After successfully updating Earbuds via DFU, a popup incorrectly prompts the user to use Lens Desktop to update the Charge Case.
steps: Start a DFU update for both Earbuds (EB) and Charge Case (CC).
Trigger and complete the DFU for the Earbuds successfully.
Return to the device home screen.
expected: After returning to the device home screen, a popup is displayed informing the user that Lens Desktop is needed to update the Charge Case.
